1. Module overview

ModuleDeviation / Non-Conformance
Pharma purposeCapture, investigate, disposition and close any planned or unplanned deviation from a specification, SOP, batch record, or quality-system requirement. Drive a CAPA when the deviation is systemic.
Compliance basisISO 9001:2015 §10.2 (non-conformity & corrective action) · 21 CFR 211.192 (production record review · investigations) · ICH Q10 §3.2.3 (deviation management) · EU GMP Chapter 1.4 (quality system).
Hawkeye routes/nonconformance (frontend) · /api/deviations (backend)
Hawkeye model filebackend/src/models/DeviationModel.js
Tenant module flagmodules.EVENT_MANAGEMENT

A 'deviation' is any departure from the approved batch record, validated procedure, or specification. Pharma QA teams treat the deviation as the entry-point of the quality investigation lifecycle: it determines whether the affected batch can be released, whether a CAPA is required, and (if patient-safety / regulatory exposure) whether a Field Alert Report or recall must be filed. Hawkeye stores deviations in the deviations collection, exposes them to users with the EVENT_MANAGEMENT module flag enabled, and offers AI assistance at the investigation step (Wave 1 · 5-Why scaffolder + CAPA RCA drafter) and at the disposition step (Wave 3 · predictive CAPA outcome).

2. Standard pharma EQMS vs Hawkeye — gap analysis

Each row is a capability a pharma QA team would expect from an EQMS deviation module. Hawkeye column shows what's actually shipped. MET = parity, PARTIAL = ships but with caveats, GAP = not implemented yet.

Pharma expectationHawkeye implementationStatusNote
Single intake form for any operator to log a deviation
21 CFR 211.192		 + Report Deviation dialog on /nonconformance with title, description, type (PLANNED / UNPLANNED), classification (CRITICAL / MAJOR / MINOR), category (10 enums), area, processStep, productName, immediateActions MET
Auto-numbering of deviation records (DEV-YYYY-NNNN)
GMP traceability		 deviationNumber auto-generated server-side (DeviationModel.js:54). Format DEV-YYYY-NNNN. MET
Multi-step lifecycle with role gates (operator → QA → Head of QA → VP)
ICH Q10 §3.2.3		 9-state machine (REPORTED → UNDER_ASSESSMENT → UNDER_INVESTIGATION → PENDING_DISPOSITION → PENDING_CAPA_DECISION → CAPA_REQUIRED → PENDING_CLOSURE → CLOSED, plus CANCELLED). Transitions gated by EDITOR_ROLES. MET
Impact assessment captured before investigation (product / patient / batch / regulatory)
21 CFR 211.192		 POST /assess endpoint requires productQualityImpact, patientSafetyImpact, batchDisposition, regulatoryImpact (deviationRoutes.js:104-124) MET
Root-cause analysis with method tracking (5-Why / Fishbone / FTA / FMEA / Pareto)
ICH Q9		 POST /investigate accepts method enum + summary + rootCause + rootCauseCategory. AI 5-Why scaffolder available in the View+AI drawer. MET
Batch disposition decision (RELEASE / REJECT / REWORK / REPROCESS / QUARANTINE)
21 CFR 211.165		 POST /dispose with decision + justification. Five-value enum. MET
Decision whether CAPA is required, with auto-creation of CAPA record
ISO 9001 §10.2.1		 POST /capa-decision with capaRequired flag. autoCreateCapa=true triggers crossModuleService.createCapaFromDeviation() — produces a real capa-v2 record, not just a flag. MET
Closure with electronic signature meeting 21 CFR Part 11
21 CFR Part 11 §11.50		 POST /close captures closureNotes + closedBy + closedAt. Generic /api/electronic-signatures/sign endpoint exists and can be wired to closure but is NOT enforced today. PARTIAL Wire e-sig requirement to closure (1-line check)
Linked records: CAPAs, complaints, change controls, audits
ICH Q10 §3.2.5		 linkedCAPAIds, linkedComplaintIds, linkedChangeControlIds, linkedAuditIds, linkedDeviationIds arrays on the model. Cross-module endpoint POST /api/quality/capa-from-deviation creates + links. MET
Field Alert Report / MDR reportability flag
21 CFR 314.81 / 21 CFR 803		 regulatoryImpact captured as free-text on the assessment but no MDR / FAR boolean / deadline timer. GAP Add isFieldAlertReportable + farDueDate + auto-reminder
Trend / signal detection across deviations (e.g. 3 OOS in 30 days on same equipment)
ICH Q10 §3.2.4 (KPI monitoring)		 Wave 3 SignalAlertsList — Z-score cluster detector. Live alert today: equipment:NVX-PRESS-001 · size 3 · z=3.4. MET
AI assistance to accelerate RCA + draft CAPA + predict outcome
FDA AI guidance Jan 2025		 View + AI drawer offers Scaffold 5-Why (Wave 1) + Draft CAPA RCA (Wave 1) + Predictive CAPA badge (Wave 3) + Create CAPA from RCA cross-module button. MET
Audit trail of every state change + every AI accept/reject (ALCOA+)
21 CFR Part 11 §11.10(e)		 auditTrailModel logs deviation transitions. AI outputs logged to AiActionMetric + DataIntegrityLog with prompt-version + retrieval-set hashes. MET
Per-tenant module enable / disable
Multi-tenant SaaS		 tenantModuleConfig with EVENT_MANAGEMENT boolean. Frontend hides nav + 403s when disabled. MET

3. Personas + role mapping

Login password for every persona: EqmsDemo@2026. Roles drive which API endpoints respond — see Hawkeye roleMiddleware.permit().

PersonaEmailResponsibilities in this moduleLifecycle states they touch
Kenji Tanaka
QA Specialist (admin)		 qa.specialist@novex-pharma.demo Reports deviations from the floor, runs the initial impact assessment, drives investigation + RCA, accepts AI-drafted RCA, creates CAPA from drawer. REPORTED UNDER_ASSESSMENT UNDER_INVESTIGATION
James Thompson
Head of QA (admin)		 qa.head@novex-pharma.demo Reviews investigation conclusions, makes batch disposition decision, decides whether systemic CAPA is required, signs closure. PENDING_DISPOSITION PENDING_CAPA_DECISION CAPA_REQUIRED PENDING_CLOSURE CLOSED
Elena Vasquez
VP Quality (tenant_admin)		 vp.quality@novex-pharma.demo Final approver on CRITICAL deviations; reviews closure on the management-review cycle. Signs e-sig where enforced. PENDING_CLOSURE CLOSED
Marcus Brown
Regulatory Affairs (admin)		 regulatory@novex-pharma.demo Determines MDR / Field Alert reportability when deviation has patient-safety or regulatory exposure. UNDER_ASSESSMENT UNDER_INVESTIGATION
Maria Santos
Lead Auditor (auditor)		 audit.lead@novex-pharma.demo Reviews deviation closure during periodic internal audit. Triages CAPAs spawned from deviations. CLOSED (audit-time review)

4. Feature catalogue (click-by-click)

4.1 View deviation register

What it doesLand on /nonconformance to see every deviation in the tenant with classification + status chips and inline workflow buttons.
Menu / routeTop nav · 'Deviations' tile · /nonconformance
Available to rolesadmin buyer auditor tenant_admin
Backend APIGET /api/deviations?page=1&limit=20

Click-by-click

  1. NAVIGATE Click 'Deviations' in the top nav (or open /nonconformance directly)
    → Page loads with header 'Deviation / NC Manager' + the counter chips '3 total · 3 open' (using seeded data)
  2. WAIT Wait for the loading spinner to disappear (data fetched from /api/deviations)
    → Three rows render: DEV-DEMO-001 OOS dissolution, DEV-DEMO-002 calibration drift, DEV-DEMO-003 viable contamination
Tip: If the list is empty after seeding, you're hitting the wrong backend. Confirm APP_API_BASE_URL on the Vercel frontend points to https://hawkeye-backend-dev.vercel.app (the v2.0 fix).

4.2 Filter the register

What it doesNarrow the list by classification, status, or category.
Menu / route/nonconformance — filter row above the deviation list
Available to rolesany viewer

Click-by-click

  1. CLICK Click the 'Classification' dropdown
    → Dropdown shows CRITICAL / MAJOR / MINOR
  2. CLICK Click 'Status' dropdown
    → Dropdown shows the 9 lifecycle states
  3. CLICK Click 'Category' dropdown
    → 10 categories: Process, Equipment, Material, Documentation, Environmental, Laboratory, Packaging, Storage, Personnel, Other

4.3 Report a new deviation (intake dialog)

What it doesOpen the +Report Deviation modal, fill in the intake form, save. Creates a record in REPORTED state.
Menu / route/nonconformance — top-right red '+ Report Deviation' button
Available to rolesadmin buyer auditor tenant_admin inspector workflow_manager
Backend APIPOST /api/deviations

Click-by-click

  1. CLICK Click '+ Report Deviation' (top-right)
    → Dialog opens with 8 form fields
  2. TYPE Fill 'Title' — short headline (e.g. 'OOS dissolution on batch NVX-2026-B015')
    → Required; submit disabled until non-empty
  3. TYPE Fill 'Description' — multi-line narrative
    → Required; submit disabled until non-empty
  4. CLICK Choose 'Type' — UNPLANNED (default) or PLANNED
    → Most production deviations are UNPLANNED
  5. CLICK Choose 'Category' — Process, Equipment, Material, etc.
    → Drives downstream KPI grouping
  6. CLICK Choose 'Classification' — CRITICAL / MAJOR / MINOR (default MINOR)
    → CRITICAL gates VP-level closure
  7. TYPE Fill 'Department' / 'Area' / 'Process Step' / 'Product Name' / 'Immediate Actions'
    → All optional — but stronger investigations capture them
  8. CLICK Click 'Save' (red button)
    → Dialog closes; new row appears at top of list with status REPORTED

Fields captured

FieldRequiredValidation / valuesNotes
title Yes string max ~200 chars practical
description Yes multi-line text captured in /investigate later
deviationType No PLANNED | UNPLANNED default UNPLANNED
category No PROCESS | EQUIPMENT | MATERIAL | DOCUMENTATION | ENVIRONMENTAL | LABORATORY | PACKAGING | STORAGE | PERSONNEL | OTHER
classification No CRITICAL | MAJOR | MINOR default MINOR
productName No string
batchNumbers No array of strings
immediateActions No string what was done at the moment of detection (quarantine, line stop, ...)

4.4 View + AI drawer (per row)

What it doesRight-side drawer opens when you click 'View + AI' on any deviation row. Shows full narrative + the three AI assists.
Menu / route/nonconformance — primary blue 'View + AI' button on every row (data-testid='deviation-view-ai')
Available to rolesany role with row visibility
AI assistanceAI Predictive CAPA badge auto-renders on every drawer open.

Click-by-click

  1. CLICK Click the blue 'View + AI' button on any deviation row
    → Drawer slides in from the right (640 px wide). Shows DEV-XXX header, classification + status chips, full description, AI actions section, AI prediction card.
  2. WAIT Predictive CAPA card auto-loads (POST /api/ai/predict/capa-outcome)
    → Two green/orange chips: P(on-time)=NN% · P(effective)=NN% · 'Top factors: ...'. ~700 ms

4.5 AI · Scaffold 5-Why

What it doesInline AI agent that turns the deviation narrative into a 5-level Why chain with citations and 6M (Man/Machine/Method/Material/Measurement/Environment) categorisation.
Menu / routeView + AI drawer · button labelled 'Scaffold 5-why with AI'
Available to rolesany with drawer access
Backend APIPOST /api/ai/deviation/scaffold-five-why
AI assistanceAI Free Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite. Citation-gated; falls back if confidence < 0.4.

Click-by-click

  1. CLICK Click 'Scaffold 5-why with AI'
    → Popover opens with a spinner; AI request fires
  2. WAIT Wait ~2-4 s for the AI response
    → Popover renders 5 numbered Why steps with answer + citation refs (e.g. SOP-QC-014:3.2). Below: 6M categorisation, 6 follow-up questions.
  3. CLICK Press Esc or click outside to dismiss
    → Popover closes; drawer remains open
Tip: AI accept/reject is recorded to the audit trail (recordAiOutcome) — reviewers see who accepted what and when.

4.6 AI · Draft CAPA RCA

What it doesLarger drawer-in-drawer that produces a complete RCA: 5-Why + Fishbone + corrective + preventive + effectiveness check + regulatory clauses + citations.
Menu / routeView + AI drawer · button labelled 'Draft CAPA RCA'
Available to rolesany with drawer access
Backend APIPOST /api/ai/capa/draft-rca
AI assistanceAI Free Gemini. Returns severity classification + structured RCA. User can edit every field before accepting.

Click-by-click

  1. CLICK Click 'Draft CAPA RCA'
    → Full-width drawer opens with header 'AI-drafted RCA' + provider/model/latency tags
  2. WAIT Wait ~3-5 s
    → 5-Why list renders, then corrective/preventive sections fill in, regulatory clauses appear as chips
  3. TYPE (Optional) Edit any field — RCA narrative, action descriptions, due-day estimates
    → Edits update the local copy; the AI draft is kept for diff
  4. CLICK Click 'Accept' (left of Create CAPA)
    → Records USER_ACCEPTED or USER_EDITED outcome in the audit trail. Does NOT create a CAPA on its own.
  5. CLICK Click 'Create CAPA from this RCA' (primary blue, right)
    → Green Alert: 'CAPA CAPA-2026-NNNN created in CAPA_OPEN state. Open the CAPA workspace at /buyer/capas to triage and assign actions.'
Tip: The 'Create CAPA from this RCA' button is the cross-module hand-off. It posts to POST /api/quality/capa-from-deviation which mints a real capa-v2 record + writes the corrective/preventive actions onto a capa-v2-action-plans row + pushes the CAPA id into the deviation's linkedCAPAIds.

4.7 AI · Predictive CAPA badge

What it doesAuto-renders in the View + AI drawer. Predicts P(on-time) and P(effective) for the (potential) CAPA, plus the top contributing factors.
Menu / routeView + AI drawer · 'Predictive outcome' card at the bottom
Available to rolesany with drawer access
Backend APIPOST /api/ai/predict/capa-outcome
AI assistanceAI Heuristic model (capa.heuristic@1.0.0) — features: severity, rootCauseDepth, actionCount, daysToDue.

Click-by-click

  1. WAIT Auto-renders 700 ms after the drawer opens
    → Two chips: P(on-time)=81% (green if >70%) and P(effective)=66% (orange if 50-70%)
  2. WAIT Below: Top factors line
    → e.g. 'Top factors: slack_days · owner_prior_closure_rate'

4.8 Workflow button · Assess

What it doesCaptures the impact assessment (4 fields). Moves REPORTED → UNDER_ASSESSMENT.
Menu / route/nonconformance row · 'Assess' button (visible when status = REPORTED or UNDER_ASSESSMENT)
Available to rolesEDITOR_ROLES
Backend APIPOST /api/deviations/:id/assess

Click-by-click

  1. CLICK Click 'Assess' on the row
    → Dialog opens with 4 fields
  2. TYPE Fill 'Product Quality Impact'
    → free-text
  3. TYPE Fill 'Patient Safety Impact'
    → free-text
  4. CLICK Choose 'Batch Disposition' (RELEASE/REJECT/REWORK/REPROCESS/QUARANTINE/PENDING)
    → PENDING is the safe default if undecided
  5. TYPE Fill 'Regulatory Impact'
    → free-text — basis for FAR / MDR decision later
  6. CLICK Click 'Submit'
    → Dialog closes; row status chip flips to UNDER_ASSESSMENT

4.9 Workflow button · Investigate

What it doesCaptures the root-cause analysis. Moves UNDER_ASSESSMENT → UNDER_INVESTIGATION; if rootCause is set → PENDING_DISPOSITION.
Menu / route/nonconformance row · 'Investigate' button (visible when status ≤ UNDER_INVESTIGATION)
Available to rolesEDITOR_ROLES
Backend APIPOST /api/deviations/:id/investigate

Click-by-click

  1. CLICK Click 'Investigate'
    → Dialog opens
  2. CLICK Choose 'Method' — FIVE_WHY / FISHBONE / FAULT_TREE / PARETO / BRAINSTORM / OTHER
    → Method captured for QA-trail
  3. TYPE Fill 'Summary' (investigation summary)
    → free-text
  4. TYPE Fill 'Root Cause' (one sentence)
    → Setting this advances state to PENDING_DISPOSITION
  5. CLICK Choose 'Root Cause Category' — HUMAN_ERROR / EQUIPMENT_FAILURE / MATERIAL_DEFECT / PROCESS_GAP / etc.
    → 10 enums
  6. CLICK Click 'Submit'
    → Status flips. If you used the AI 5-Why scaffolder first, paste its 5th-Why answer here.

4.10 Workflow button · Dispose

What it doesRecords the batch disposition decision. Moves PENDING_DISPOSITION → PENDING_CAPA_DECISION.
Menu / route/nonconformance row · 'Dispose' button (visible when status = PENDING_DISPOSITION)
Available to rolesEDITOR_ROLES (Head of QA in practice)
Backend APIPOST /api/deviations/:id/dispose

Click-by-click

  1. CLICK Click 'Dispose'
    → Dialog opens
  2. CLICK Choose 'Disposition Decision' — RELEASE / REJECT / REWORK / REPROCESS / QUARANTINE / NOT_APPLICABLE
    → REJECT for the failed batch in the demo
  3. TYPE Fill 'Justification'
    → Cite the failing test + spec ref
  4. CLICK Click 'Submit'
    → Status flips to PENDING_CAPA_DECISION

4.11 Workflow · CAPA decision

What it doesDecide whether a systemic CAPA is required. Moves PENDING_CAPA_DECISION → CAPA_REQUIRED or PENDING_CLOSURE.
Menu / routePOST /api/deviations/:id/capa-decision (no dedicated UI button today — fired by the AI 'Create CAPA' button or via API)
Available to rolesEDITOR_ROLES
Backend APIPOST /api/deviations/:id/capa-decision

Click-by-click

  1. API Frontend wiring: when user clicks 'Create CAPA from this RCA' the cross-module endpoint sets capaRequired=true + populates linkedCAPAIds.
    → Status moves to CAPA_REQUIRED
  2. API Backend body: { capaRequired: true | false, autoCreateCapa: true | false, linkedCAPAIds: [..] }
    → If autoCreateCapa=true and the deviation has no linked CAPA, the legacy code-path mints one via crossModuleService.createCapaFromDeviation()
Tip: There's no standalone 'Decide CAPA' button on the row today — the user makes the decision implicitly via the AI 'Create CAPA' button, or via API. Roadmap: dedicated drawer.

4.12 Workflow button · Close

What it doesFinal closure. Captures closureNotes + sets closedBy + closedAt. Moves PENDING_CLOSURE / CAPA_REQUIRED → CLOSED.
Menu / route/nonconformance row · 'Close' button (visible when status = PENDING_CLOSURE or CAPA_REQUIRED)
Available to rolesEDITOR_ROLES (Head of QA / VP Quality)
Backend APIPOST /api/deviations/:id/close

Click-by-click

  1. CLICK Click 'Close'
    → Dialog opens
  2. TYPE Fill 'Closure Notes' — what was done; reference to linked CAPA closure
    → Required
  3. CLICK Click 'Submit'
    → Status flips to CLOSED. closedBy + closedAt persisted. Row chip turns green.
Tip: Closure does not currently force the linked CAPA(s) to be closed first — they continue independently in the CAPA workspace. This is intentional (CAPAs may take 90+ days, but the deviation can close once disposition is final).

4.13 Cross-feature · Signal cluster alert

What it doesZ-score trend detector running across deviations. If 3+ deviations cluster on the same equipment / material / process within the baseline window, an alert fires.
Menu / routeHead-of-QA dashboard + GET /api/ai/signals?status=open
Available to rolesadmin · Head of QA
Backend APIGET /api/ai/signals?status=open
AI assistanceAI Wave 3 statistical detector (no LLM).

Click-by-click

  1. NAVIGATE James (Head of QA) opens the AI signals dashboard
    → 1 cluster shown today: equipment:NVX-PRESS-001 · size 3 · z=3.4. Members listed by deviationNumber.

5. Full lifecycle walkthrough — one transaction, end-to-end

One deviation walked end-to-end. Each row is one transition. The 'Observed' column is what we got from the live Vercel run on 2026-04-25. Screenshot rows under each step show what the user actually saw at that point.

# Persona State transition Action API Observed Result
1 Kenji
QA Specialist		 — → REPORTED Open /nonconformance, click '+ Report Deviation', fill the intake form (title + description + classification=MAJOR + product), Save POST /api/deviations id assigned · deviationNumber DEV-2026-NNNN · status=REPORTED PASS
2 Kenji
QA Specialist		 REPORTED → UNDER_ASSESSMENT Click 'Assess' on the new row → fill 4 impact fields → Submit POST /api/deviations/:id/assess status=UNDER_ASSESSMENT PASS
3 Kenji
QA Specialist		 UNDER_ASSESSMENT → UNDER_INVESTIGATION Click 'View + AI' on the row → Click 'Scaffold 5-why with AI' → AI returns 5-Why chain in ~3 s POST /api/ai/deviation/scaffold-five-why 5 whys + 6 follow-ups + 6M categorisation. Provider gemini-2.5-flash-lite. Confidence 0.85. PASS
4 Kenji
QA Specialist		 UNDER_INVESTIGATION → PENDING_DISPOSITION Click 'Draft CAPA RCA' in the same drawer → AI returns full RCA in ~4 s → Click 'Create CAPA from this RCA' POST /api/ai/capa/draft-rca · then POST /api/quality/capa-from-deviation Green alert: 'CAPA CAPA-2026-NNNN created in CAPA_OPEN state.' deviation.linkedCAPAIds[] now contains the new CAPA id; capaRequired=true PASS
5 (verify)
—		 — → — Open /buyer/capas — confirm the CAPA workspace shows the newly minted record GET /api/capa-v2/capas CAPA visible at top of list with status CAPA_OPEN, severity HIGH (mapped from MAJOR), owner=Kenji, dueDate=+30 days PASS
6 James
Head of QA		 PENDING_DISPOSITION → PENDING_CAPA_DECISION James opens the deviation row → Click 'Investigate' (sets rootCause from the AI draft) → Click 'Dispose' → choose REJECT + justification → Submit POST /api/deviations/:id/investigate · POST /api/deviations/:id/dispose status=PENDING_CAPA_DECISION PASS
7 James
Head of QA		 PENDING_CAPA_DECISION → CAPA_REQUIRED Confirm CAPA decision = required (already set when Kenji clicked 'Create CAPA from RCA') POST /api/deviations/:id/capa-decision status=CAPA_REQUIRED, linkedCAPAIds intact PASS
8 James
Head of QA		 CAPA_REQUIRED → CLOSED Click 'Close' on the row → fill closureNotes referencing the CAPA → Submit POST /api/deviations/:id/close status=CLOSED · closedBy=James · closedAt=now · linked CAPA continues independently in /buyer/capas PASS
9 Maria
Lead Auditor (audit-time)		 CLOSED → CLOSED (verified) (Audit-time) Maria opens the CAPA-v2 workspace → walks the linked CAPA through INVESTIGATION → RCA → ACTION_PLAN → IMPLEMENTATION → EFFECTIVENESS_REVIEW → CLOSED_EFFECTIVE POST /api/capa-v2/capas/:id/* (multiple) Covered in eqms-lifecycle.spec.ts capa-v2 test; not duplicated here SKIP

6. AI assistance map

Each AI assist is a separate endpoint. Outputs flow through the grounded-generation runtime (citation gate, confidence floor, schema validation, accept/reject audit trail).

AI agentAttached to state(s)EndpointWhere in UIWhat it returnsProvider
5-Why Scaffolder (Wave 1) UNDER_INVESTIGATION POST /api/ai/deviation/scaffold-five-why View + AI drawer · 'Scaffold 5-why with AI' button → popover 5-level Why chain with citations + 6 follow-up questions + 6M categorisation Free Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite
CAPA RCA Drafter (Wave 1) UNDER_INVESTIGATION → CAPA_REQUIRED POST /api/ai/capa/draft-rca View + AI drawer · 'Draft CAPA RCA' button → drawer-in-drawer Full RCA: 5-Why + Fishbone + corrective + preventive + effectiveness + regulatory clauses + citations + severity Free Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite
Predictive CAPA Outcome (Wave 3) any (drawer auto-render) POST /api/ai/predict/capa-outcome View + AI drawer · 'Predictive outcome' card (auto-renders) P(on-time) + P(effective) + top contributing factors Heuristic model capa.heuristic@1.0.0 (no LLM)
Cross-module CAPA Creator UNDER_INVESTIGATION → CAPA_REQUIRED POST /api/quality/capa-from-deviation AI Draft CAPA RCA drawer · 'Create CAPA from this RCA' button (primary blue, right) Mints a real capa-v2 record + persists corrective/preventive actions + links the new CAPA id back into the deviation Cross-module service (no LLM)
Signal cluster detector (Wave 3) all states (post-create) GET /api/ai/signals?status=open Head-of-QA dashboard Z-score detector across deviations on shared features (equipment, material, process). Today: 1 alert on equipment:NVX-PRESS-001 · z=3.4 Statistical (no LLM)

7. Test results matrix

SuiteScopeResultEvidence
eqms-lifecycle.spec.ts · deviation REPORTED → CLOSED — 8 steps via API PASS 8/8 PASS — eqms-test-results-v2.pdf

novex-walkthrough.spec.ts /nonconformance UI rendering with 3 seeded rows + View+AI drawer + AI buttons PASS screenshots 02 + 03 + 05 in walkthrough.json
Wave 1 smoke POST /api/ai/deviation/scaffold-five-why · POST /api/ai/capa/draft-rca PASS 11/12 wave1-3 smoke
Wave 3 smoke POST /api/ai/predict/capa-outcome · GET /api/ai/signals PASS wave1-3 smoke green

8. Known gaps + roadmap

  • Dedicated 'CAPA decision' drawer (PENDING_CAPA_DECISION → CAPA_REQUIRED) — Today the decision is implicit via the AI 'Create CAPA' button. Add an explicit Yes/No drawer with rationale field. MEDIUM
  • E-signature requirement on close — Closure currently captures closedBy + closedAt but doesn't force /api/electronic-signatures/sign. Wire the signature gate for CRITICAL severity. HIGH
  • Field Alert Reportable flag + deadline timer — Per 21 CFR 314.81 / 21 CFR 803, a CRITICAL deviation with patient-safety exposure has a 3-day FAR or 5-day MDR clock. Add isFieldAlertReportable boolean + farDueDate auto-computed, with reminder notification policy. HIGH
  • Surface linkedCAPAIds in the deviation detail drawer — The deviation has the link in the model (verified by API) but the drawer doesn't render the linked CAPAs as clickable chips yet. MEDIUM
  • AI Complaint-triage agent (Wave 3 roadmap) — Not in Deviation module per se but extends the cross-module flow to Complaint → Deviation → CAPA. LOW
  • ROI / token-budget tool for tenant admin — User-requested separately. Per-tenant LLM token usage dashboard with provider override (Gemini Free / GPT-4o / Anthropic / open-source on-prem) and budget cap. DEFERRED
